"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\test_static.dir/objects.a
E:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\test_static.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\test_static.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -w -DWIN32 -D_WINDOWS -DFLAC__NO_DLL -DFLAC__STATIC_BUILD -DLIB_ZPLAY_DYNAMIC -DLIB_ZPLAY_EXPORT_WITH_DEF_FILE -g -DNDEBUG -O3 -ffast-math -fno-math-errno -ffinite-math-only -fno-rounding-math -fno-signaling-nans -freciprocal-math -fassociative-math -mcrtdll=ucrt -fpermissive -O3 -DNDEBUG -mcrtdll=ucrt -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\test_static.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o E:\libzplay_final_merge\out_fine\out\mingw\UCRT\x64\release\-OF\example\test_static.exe -Wl,--out-implib,E:\libzplay_final_merge\out_fine\out\mingw\UCRT\x64\release\-OF\lib\libtest_static.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\test_static.dir\linkLibs.rsp
